notes: SKY holders vote to elect "spells" (upgrade contracts). The winning spell must wait 24 hours before it can execute changes. This creates binding, verifiable onchain governance.

evidence.name: Governance Workflow
evidence.summary:
How votes become protocol changes:

1. Lock SKY tokens in voting contract
2. Vote for a "spell" (upgrade contract)
3. Winning spell schedules execution via plot()
4. 24-hour delay enforced (eta >= now + 86400s)
5. After delay, anyone can trigger exec()

The plot() function enforces the delay — no spell can execute without waiting.

evidence.name: Timelock Contract
evidence.summary: All governance actions execute through a timelock (Pause Proxy). The 24-hour delay gives users time to exit before changes take effect.
